subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! That which thou hadst written was perused. Value thou the maidservant of God, Mrs. Brittingham [3.5s]... ...if you seek immunity from the sway of the forces of the contingent world, hang the Most Great Name in your dwelling
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید قدر امة الله بریتنگهام را
subcodes.subjects: @occult sciences; psychic phenomena, @photographs and recordings, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Greatest Name, @importance of prayer
